review_text: Hi, my name is Rajesh Kumar and I ordered this FreshBreeze air cooler. My phone number is 9876543210 and my email is rajesh.kumar@email.com. The cooler works well for small rooms. Cools down in 10 minutes, water tank is easy to fill. Would buy again for my bedroom.

scoring_notes.notes: PII (name, phone, email) should be redacted before LLM; extraction should still succeed
